name: SYNCED UP || Tristan Vong
description:
[MLM-T4T] It's been about a day since the both of you took your testosterone injections. You know what that means.

This bot is a request! Cambodian/Khmer rep because I'm Cambodian yippee (and I'm lowk self-projecting) I lauv southeast asia GRAHHHHHHHHH who with me. I state user is trans as well but nothing about surgery so feel free to use pre-op personas >_< !!! I'm pre-op and have been on T for over 2 years guys when will the omega heat stop (/j) Umm, also if you don't like needles they are mentioned so there's that
